claimText: BioEmu is a deep learning system developed by Microsoft that is used for predicting protein shapes.
evidenceExcerpt: BioEmu is a deep learning system by Microsoft for predicting protein shapes.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching AI models to their developers or specific biological functions.
distractorHooks: Predicts DNA mutations instead of protein shapes

claimText: AlphaGenome, developed by Google DeepMind, is an AI tool that predicts how DNA mutations affect health.
evidenceExcerpt: AlphaGenome by Google DeepMind predicts how DNA mutations affect health.
examUse: Statement-based question on the applications of AI in genomics.

claimText: AlphaFold is an AI system by DeepMind that predicts 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences.
evidenceExcerpt: AlphaFold predicts 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences.
examUse: Statement-based question on AI achievements in biology.

claimText: C2S-SCALE is an AI model developed by Google DeepMind and Yale to interpret complex biological interactions at the cellular level.
evidenceExcerpt: C2S-SCALE by Google DeepMind and Yale understands the language of individual cells.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching AI tools to their specific biological applications.
